2606.28083.title: STAG: Spatio-temporal Evolving Structural Representation of Action Units for Micro-expression Recognition
2606.28083.paper_summary: Micro-expression recognition is challenging due to subtle and short-lived facial muscle movements. Existing methods rely heavily on apex-onset frames, overlook fine-grained inter-frame dynamics, and separately model spatial and temporal information, limiting generalization across datasets. To address these challenges, we propose STAG, a dynamic ROI-AU-coupled spatial-temporal network that jointly models motion flow and adaptive facial connectivity. The framework extracts optical flow from discriminative frames using magnitude-based selection and temporal attention. A dual-branch architecture combines an enhanced graph attention network for structured spatial reasoning with a transformer encoder for temporal modeling. A bidirectional cross-attention module enables mutual refinement of spatial and temporal features, while AU-guided dynamic connectivity adapts facial region interactions according to muscle activation patterns. The transformer captures subtle temporal dynamics beyond apex-based approaches, improving semantic consistency and interpretability for explainable micro-expression recognition. The fused representation is optimized using focal loss and evaluated on CASME II, 4DME, DFME, NaME, SAMM, and SMIC-HS. Extensive experiments demonstrate improved robustness, generalization, interpretability, and computational efficiency, confirming the effectiveness of adaptive relational reasoning, AU-guided dynamic connectivity, and deep spatial-temporal feature fusion for accurate cross-dataset micro-expression recognition.
2606.28083.paper_summary_zh: 微表情識別因為面部肌肉運動的微妙和短暫而具有挑戰性。現有的方法過度依賴於頂點起始幀，忽視了細微的幀間動態，並且分開建模空間和時間信息，限制了跨數據集的泛化能力。為了解決這些挑戰，我們提出了STAG，一個動態ROI-AU耦合的空間-時間網絡，該網絡聯合建模運動流和自適應面部連接。該框架使用基於幅度的選擇和時間注意力從區分性幀中提取光流。一個雙分支架構結合了增強的圖注意力網絡以進行結構化的空間推理，並與Transformer編碼器進行時間建模。雙向交叉注意力模塊使空間和時間特徵的相互精煉成為可能，而AU引導的動態連接根據肌肉激活模式調整面部區域的交互。Transformer捕捉超越基於頂點的方法的微妙時間動態，改善了語義一致性和可解釋性，以實現可解釋的微表情識別。融合表示使用焦點損失進行優化，並在CASME II、4DME、DFME、NaME、SAMM和SMIC-HS上進行評估。廣泛的實驗證明了改進的魯棒性、泛化能力、可解釋性和計算效率，確認了自適應關係推理、AU引導的動態連接和深度空間-時間特徵融合在準確的跨數據集微表情識別中的有效性。
2606.28083.author: Nandani Sharma et.al.
2606.28083.authors: Nandani Sharma, Varun Sharma, Dinesh Singh
